stretches.name: Neck Side Stretch
stretches.procedure: Gently tilt your head toward one shoulder until you feel a mild stretch. Hold, then switch sides. Keep shoulders relaxed.

stretches.name: Neck Rotation
stretches.procedure: Sit tall. Slowly turn your head to look over one shoulder until you feel a gentle stretch. Return to center, then repeat on the other side. Do not force the range.

stretches.name: Chin Tuck
stretches.procedure: Sit or stand with a tall spine. Gently draw your chin straight back as if making a double chin, lengthening the back of your neck. Relax and repeat slowly.

stretches.name: Upper Trapezius Stretch
stretches.procedure: Sit tall. Gently bring one ear toward the shoulder on the same side. Optionally place the hand on your head for light pressure. Hold, then switch sides.

stretches.name: Cross-body Shoulder Stretch
stretches.procedure: Bring one arm across your chest. Use the other arm to hug it closer. Hold, then switch arms.

stretches.name: Wall Slides (W/Y)
stretches.procedure: Stand with your back against a wall, arms bent at 90° at shoulder height. Slowly slide arms upward toward a Y shape while keeping contact with the wall, then lower with control.

stretches.name: Overhead Triceps Stretch
stretches.procedure: Raise one arm overhead, bend the elbow so your hand reaches toward the opposite shoulder blade. Gently press with the other hand. Switch sides.

stretches.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch
stretches.procedure: Extend one arm forward, palm up. With the other hand, gently pull the fingers back until you feel a mild stretch along the inner forearm. Switch arms.

stretches.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch
stretches.procedure: Extend one arm forward, palm down. Bend the wrist so fingers point toward the floor; use the other hand to add gentle pressure. Switch arms.

stretches.name: Prayer Stretch (Forearms)
stretches.procedure: Press palms together in front of your chest, elbows pointing out. Lower hands toward your waistline until you feel a stretch through the forearms. Hold and breathe.

stretches.name: Doorway Pec Stretch
stretches.procedure: Place forearms on a door frame with elbows about shoulder height. Step through gently until you feel a stretch across the chest. Hold, then adjust arm height slightly and repeat.

stretches.name: Cat–Cow (Spine Mobility)
stretches.procedure: On hands and knees, alternate rounding your spine toward the ceiling (cat) and arching gently (cow) with slow breaths.

stretches.name: Child's Pose
stretches.procedure: Kneel and sit back toward your heels, arms extended forward or alongside your body. Breathe and relax the lower back.

stretches.name: Thread the Needle
stretches.procedure: On hands and knees, reach one arm under the opposite arm, lowering the shoulder and cheek toward the mat. Hold, then open into a gentle twist on the other side.

stretches.name: Thoracic Extension (Chair)
stretches.procedure: Sit in a chair, interlace hands behind your head. Lean back over the chair support to open the upper back slightly. Keep movements small and comfortable.

stretches.name: Supine Spinal Twist
stretches.procedure: Lie on your back, hug one knee toward your chest, then guide it across the body toward the floor while keeping shoulders down. Switch sides.

stretches.name: Seated Side Bend
stretches.procedure: Sit tall in a chair or on the floor. Reach one arm overhead and lean to the opposite side until you feel a stretch along the side of your torso. Switch sides.

stretches.name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
stretches.procedure: Hinge at the hips with a flat back, resting hands on thighs or a support. Feel a gentle stretch along the backs of the legs.

stretches.name: Seated Hamstring Stretch
stretches.procedure: Sit on the edge of a chair or on the floor with one leg extended, toes up. Hinge forward from the hips with a long spine. Switch legs.

stretches.name: Standing Quad Stretch
stretches.procedure: Stand on one leg (use a wall for balance if needed). Bend the other knee and bring heel toward glute. Keep knees together. Switch legs.

stretches.name: Calf Stretch (Wall)
stretches.procedure: Place hands on a wall, step one foot back with the leg straight and heel down. Lean gently forward. Switch legs.

stretches.name: Hip Flexor Lunge Stretch
stretches.procedure: Step into a low lunge, back leg straight or knee down. Shift weight forward slightly to open the front of the hip. Switch sides.

stretches.name: Seated Groin (Butterfly)
stretches.procedure: Sit with soles of the feet together and knees apart. Hold ankles, sit tall, and gently press knees toward the floor without bouncing.

stretches.name: Standing IT Band Side Lean
stretches.procedure: Stand near a wall for support. Cross one leg behind the other and reach the same-side arm overhead, leaning away until you feel a stretch along the outer hip and thigh. Switch sides.

stretches.name: World's Greatest Stretch
stretches.procedure: From a lunge, place both hands inside the front foot. Rotate the same-side arm toward the ceiling in a controlled opener, then step to repeat on the other side.

stretches.name: Side-Lying Quad Stretch
stretches.procedure: Lie on your side, bend the top knee and catch the ankle behind you, drawing the heel toward your glute. Keep knees aligned. Switch sides.

stretches.name: Figure-four (Glute) Stretch
stretches.procedure: Lie on your back, cross one ankle over the opposite knee, gently pull the thigh toward you. Switch sides.

stretches.name: Pigeon Pose (Glute)
stretches.procedure: From hands and knees, bring one knee forward toward the same-side wrist and extend the other leg back. Square hips and fold forward as tolerated. Switch sides.

stretches.name: Seated Piriformis Stretch
stretches.procedure: Sit tall, cross one ankle over the opposite knee into a figure-four. Hinge forward slightly from the hips until you feel a stretch in the glute. Switch sides.
